ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall recorded */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Total evaporation recorded */,
  "sunshine" REAL /* Total sunshine hours recorded */,
  "wind_gust_dir" TEXT /* Direction of the strongest wind gust */,
  "wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Speed of the strongest wind gust */,
  "wind_dir_9am" TEXT /* Wind direction at 9 AM */,
  "wind_dir_3pm" TEXT /* Wind direction at 3 PM */,
  "wind_speed_9am" REAL /* Wind speed at 9 AM */,
  "wind_speed_3pm" REAL /* Wind speed at 3 PM */,
  "humidity_9am" INTEGER /* Relative humidity at 9 AM */,
  "humidity_3pm" INTEGER /* Relative humidity at 3 PM */,
  "pressure_9am" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at 9 AM */,
  "pressure_3pm" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at 3 PM */,
  "cloud_9am" INTEGER /* Cloud cover at 9 AM */,
  "cloud_3pm" INTEGER /* Cloud cover at 3 PM */,
  "temp_9am" REAL /* Temperature at 9 AM */,
  "temp_3pm" REAL /* Temperature at 3 PM */,
  "rain_today" TEXT /* Indicates if it rained today (Yes/No) */,
  "risk_mm" REAL /* Estimated rainfall risk for the next day */,
  "rain_tomorrow" TEXT /* Forecasted rain for the next day (Yes/No) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of the data quality */,
  "data_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the location is situated */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  "last_calibration" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of weather model */,
  "model_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather model used for the forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_min_temp" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature */,
  "forecast_max_temp" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature */,
  "forecast_rainfall" REAL /* Forecasted rainfall */,
  "forecast_wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed */,
  "forecast_humidity" INTEGER /* Forecasted relative humidity */,
  "forecast_pressure" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure */,
  "forecast_cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Forecasted cloud cover */,
  "forecast_temp" REAL /* Forecasted temperature */,
  "forecast_rain" TEXT /* Forecasted rain (Yes/No) */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast */,
  "forecast_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time of the forecast in hours */,
  "forecast_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed */,
  "accessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed record */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_field" TEXT /* Field of the data being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of validation */,
  "validation_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data anomaly */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was resolved */,
  "anomaly_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anomalies_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  "source_license" TEXT /* License associated with the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integrity log */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry checked */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of integrity check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the integrity check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the integrity check was performed */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken based on the check result */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of integrity checks */,
  "check_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data maintenance log */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance activity was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_maintenance_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
